Hero.role: UI ENGINEER FOCUSED ON UX EXPERIENCE.
Hero.description: Building interfaces that feel like a natural extension of your product — fast, precise, and crafted with attention to every detail.
Hero.description2: I'm the person who bridges the gap between design and engineering to give your product that extra polish to stand out from the rest.

Work.title: My Work
Work.subtitle: Where design comes to life through code.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: UX Engineer & Frontend Developer
About.description1: With 5+ years of experience, I build interfaces that solve real problems. I work at the intersection of design and development.
About.description2: Specialized in user experience, accessibility, and clean code. I create products that people enjoy using.
About.description3: Always learning. Inspired by games, typography, and good design.

Contact.title: Elsewhere
Contact.description: Connect with me on social media or send me an email. Always interested in talking about design, development, and new projects.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.description:
1. Built and optimized interfaces with React and TypeScript within a micro-frontend architecture, ensuring visual precision and long-term scalability.
2. Led the frontend development of a new client-facing platform, integrating Laravel as backend and delivering a clean end-to-end implementation.
3. Designed and implemented responsive emails and a UI component system aligned with the product's design guidelines.
4. Served as the bridge between design and engineering, translating complex specifications into pixel-perfect interfaces with meticulous attention to detail.

2.title: Web Designer
2.description:
1. Designed and developed custom interfaces for WordPress sites, tailoring themes, styles, and flows to meet each client's goals.
2. Strategically selected and integrated plugins to extend functionality without affecting performance or maintainability.
3. Delivered 1:1 mentoring sessions to early-stage students, covering HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals with a hands-on approach.
4. Collaborated on component layout and usability improvements for projects built on HubSpot.

3.title: Web UI Developer
3.description:
1. Developed and maintained features across multiple internal platforms, ensuring visual consistency and stability.
2. Led migration and refactoring efforts across the codebase, improving overall quality and readability.
3. Redesigned the main site's experience, achieving a perfect accessibility score of 100 on Lighthouse.
4. Created UX/UI mockups in Figma that served as the direct reference for the development team.
5. Built and documented a reusable UI component system (buttons, menus, inputs, etc.) within the project's style guide.
6. Provided cross-team technical support, acting as the frontend reference across the company.

4.title: Freelance Web Designer
4.description:
1. Designed and developed websites and components with React and HTML/CSS for international clients, from concept to deployment.
2. Optimized performance and cross-browser compatibility to ensure consistent experiences across all devices.
3. Managed direct client relationships, translating their needs into functional, user-centered visual solutions.

5.title: Web Layout Developer
5.description:
1. Built visual components from existing designs, maintaining fidelity to detail and consistency with the product's identity.
2. Identified and corrected layout errors, ensuring visual consistency across environments.
3. Collaborated on transforming static designs into functional interfaces, contributing to the team's quality standards.

Journal.title: Journal
Journal.post1Excerpt: I am working on some interesting topics to share with you
